title: complies_with relation (ONT-R-16, D-06)
description: Explicit normative compliance with a regulation, standard, or certification clause. Audit-grade. USE FOR: Component(structure) complies_with RegulationClause(FAR §25.305); AircraftSystem(avionics) complies_with Standard(DO-178C_LevelB); Procedure complies_with RegulationClause(EASA AMC 25.1309). DO NOT USE FOR: budget / non-normative constraints — those are constrained_by (ONT-R-04). DO NOT USE FOR: 'soft compliance' without audit trail — also constrained_by. DO NOT USE FOR: citation only — use cites (ONT-R-08). Boundary per ADR-003 / D-11: constrained_by is generic (mass budget, cost ceiling, performance limit, soft regulation reference); complies_with is explicit normative compliance with audit-grade traceability. Schema version: 0.1.0.

compliance_evidence.description: Optional URI to the TestReport / SimulationCase / Procedure entity that demonstrates the compliance claim. Phase 3 validator confirms the URI resolves to one of those entity types. Required for compliance_status == 'demonstrated' at the validator layer (not enforced by this schema).

compliance_status.description: Optional. Lifecycle of the compliance claim. 'demonstrated' = evidence on file (compliance_evidence URI present); 'claimed' = asserted by author, not yet evidenced; 'in_progress' = compliance work underway; 'exempted' = compliance waived under a documented exemption (rationale belongs in confidence.rationale).
